Can ✔ Crit: All hits from Weapons along with any projectiles spawned by those weapons.
Can't ❌ Crit: Structures - Unless you have Pile of Books

Can ✔ Crit: Piercing and Bouncing attacks can crit individually on each Pierce/Bounce.

All Explosions. This includes explosions from weapons, such as Rocket Launcher and explosions from Characters such as Bull and Glutton. Explosions from items can crit as well, such as Rip and Tear or Spicy Sauce.
Can't ❌ Crit: The ability from Lucky and Lich

Can ✔ Crit: Projectiles from Items such as Alien Eyes and Baby with a Beard can crit with a base 3% chance for 2x damage.
Can't ❌ Crit: Randomly targeted damage from items such as Baby Elephant, Cyberball, or Riposte
